assertions.assertion: Calls AddLocalApiAuthentication() to set up local API authentication
assertions.rationale: Uses AddJwtBearer pointing to localhost instead of AddLocalApiAuthentication().
Uses generic RequireAuthorization() without the specific local API policy.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that clients must include 'IdentityServerApi' in their AllowedScopes
assertions.rationale: No mention of the IdentityServerApi scope requirement.

assertions.assertion: Warns that local API authentication only works when the API is co-hosted with IdentityServer, not for separate API hosts
assertions.rationale: No warning about co-hosting requirement. The response acknowledges there's 'built-in local API support' but doesn't explain the constraint.
